external_changes.dome_site_changes: No changes. 12+ consecutive quiet polls. Version V51.0 stable.

internal_issues.description: SECTIONS.JSON NOT INJECTED INTO HTML: generate-html.js line 1777 checks 'if (SECTIONS_AVAILABLE)' before calling loadSectionsCache(). Since SECTIONS_AVAILABLE starts false and is only set to true INSIDE loadSectionsCache(), sections are never loaded. All sections.json prose (EXP-001 through EXP-018 integrated) is silently ignored. The HTML shows the original hardcoded prose, not the improved versions.

suggested_patch.rationale: Fix circular dependency: check the return value of loadSectionsCache() directly instead of the pre-check flag. Cannot self-apply — infrastructure file.

recommended_actions.action: Fix ISS-454: ONE LINE FIX in generate-html.js line 1777. Change 'if (SECTIONS_AVAILABLE) { const sections = loadSectionsCache();' to 'const sections = loadSectionsCache(); if (sections) {'. This makes ALL sections.json prose improvements visible in the published HTML. Currently 18+ integrated expansions are silently ignored.
Apply EXP-011 tab ordering (6 edits to generate-html.js — see monitor/analyst/expansions/EXP-011-tab-ordering.json). Self-Contradictions tab should precede External Tests.
Update DOCX (build-doc-v4.js): Add missing sections 5.14-5.16, fix hardcoded Self-Contradicted count, add KILLSHOT-GAIA section, fix WIN-057/058 conflation.
Verdict taxonomy review (ISS-442): Consider splitting 'Misleading' into distinct sub-categories to improve precision.
Watch April 9 reset window expiry — dome model predicted an observation between April 5-9. Check polls for any outcome claims.
